item.title: Cibi and Haka. Two cultures meeting
item.description: The Cibi and Haka are both war dances. The Cibi originated from Fiji and can be performed before or after war. It is also called Teivovo or "war fence" hence the linear formation. The haka is performed before war as a way to instill fear into the other side. It is also used for moral support to soldiers, show strength/unity/pride, and welcome/challenge visiting tribes. The haka is based from New Zealand.
item.dc:creator: Zergcollective

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i still want one
looks edible at least
that's Peter Griffin
that has to be intentional
arrest her
makes more sense than the correct spelling. damn french
i have no words
egg
oversharing, man
don't we all
mmm hmm
i recently had a dream where i thought i was about to squeeze out a blackhead on my leg but it was a small centipede. sorry for sharing this
obviously
that ain't right
unhinged
this is where i post from
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Starlight - Cosplay
item.description: The Boys new season just wrapped up so I had to pull out the ole Starlight Cosplay! The answer is yes, that body suit was insanely difficult to get on. Some say it's still on to this very day...

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Bath Bomb Girl
item.description: 10-year-old Hannah Grace may be young but she knows how to cash in on a trend. By selling homemade bath bombs through her own website, BeYOUtiful, and even giving back 20% to a cause that’s close to her heart -- juvenile diabetes -- she’s quickly becoming an entrepreneur in her own right.

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Tiny kitten squeaks
item.description: Foster kitten jasmine always squeaks a lot when she first wakes up. Like she’s trying to understand why she’s awake and not sleeping. I feel you, Jasmine. I wish I was still asleep, too. (Edit: Some awesome Imgurians have asked if they can help support my cause…I expect nothing from this kitten-loving community - except fake internet points, of course - but if you are so inclined, there are a few things here that could help: https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/2K634G59XZTP4?ref_=wl_share )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Girls Stuff…
item.dc:creator: SaticoySteele

item.title: May the Memes Be With You (And also with you).
item.description:
I love this crossover.
The Clone Wars in chronological order according to the story.
Essential Clone Wars. I’ve been assigned these by my son. Despite being a super Star Wars nerd (used to read every comic, every paperback), I’m definitely behind today. I’m old.
Ok, this is super intriguing to me. I may have to watch this.
This one took me a minute to get…
Do you want to play with us, Leia?
Is this one of the 6,000,000 forms of communication?
Ok, this is dangerous. Unless they really do have free lightsabers, in which case I’d HAVE to go check it out.
Always repost this meme. It’s too good.
This is actually really good.
Don’t downvote me for the AI! This is creative and the maker didn’t have the skills to do it on their own.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason
